testcase.name: test_right_panel_source_text_masked_before_overlay

failure.message: AttributeError: None does not have the attribute 'open'

testcase.failure: tests/test_table_border_protection.py:304: in test_right_panel_source_text_masked_before_overlay with patch("app.backend.renderers.fitz_renderer.fitz.open", side_effect=patched_open): ../../miniforge3/envs/translate-tool/lib/python3.11/unittest/mock.py:1446: in __enter__ original, local = self.get_original() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ../../miniforge3/envs/translate-tool/lib/python3.11/unittest/mock.py:1419: in get_original raise AttributeError( E AttributeError: None does not have the attribute 'open'
